text:
Robert Watson wrote:

> There's actually a slightly more general problem here--could you try this more
> general patch? I've requested to merge this to 6.3.

Hi!

I'm experiencing the same panic for INVARIANTS-enabled kernel now.
Really, it panices every time just after boot. Your patch solves
the problem, thank you.

Eugene Grosbein
